items.name: Acmevia LMS
items.audience: Schools · Universities · Tuition classes · Training centers
items.tagline: Run your entire institute from one screen.
items.description: A cloud-based learning management system for institutions that are done with paper registers and WhatsApp groups. Fully white-label — your name, your logo, your domain.

features.title: Student & course management
features.detail: Enrolment, batches, attendance, and fee tracking in one place.

features.title: Online exams with automated grading
features.detail: Set papers once. Marking, grading, and result sheets happen on their own.

features.title: Secure portals for every role
features.detail: Students, teachers, parents, and admins each see exactly what they need.

features.title: Works on any device
features.detail: Fully responsive — most students will use it on a phone, so it's built for one.

features.title: White-label & customizable
features.detail: Your brand on the door. Modules shaped to how your institute runs.

items.keyClaim: Cuts administrative work by up to 80%.
items.pricingNote: Plans from a simple monthly fee per institute — or request a custom quote.

items.name: Hall Booking & Space Management
items.tagline: Every room, every hour, one calendar.
items.description: A reservation system for organizations juggling multiple venues, halls, and meeting rooms. No more double bookings, phone-call chains, or paper diaries at the front desk.

features.title: Multi-venue calendar
features.detail: All spaces visible at once. Conflicts are impossible, not just unlikely.

features.title: Approval workflows
features.detail: Requests route to the right approver with one tap — with a full audit trail.

features.title: Resources & setup requirements
features.detail: Projectors, catering, seating layouts — attached to the booking, not to memory.

features.title: Billing & utilization reports
features.detail: See which spaces earn their keep and which sit empty.

items.keyClaim: Double bookings drop to zero from day one.
items.pricingNote: Priced per venue portfolio — request a custom quote.

items.name: Distribution Management System + Mobile POS
items.audience: FMCG distributors · Wholesalers · Field sales operations
items.tagline: Know where every unit, rupee, and rep is — right now.
items.description: Real-time tracking of every unit, transaction, and agent in your distribution network. A mobile POS app for field agents, a live dashboard for management.

features.title: Field-agent mobile POS
features.detail: Orders, invoicing, and payments captured at the shopfront — even offline.

features.title: Live management dashboard
features.detail: Sales, stock, and agent activity by route, region, and SKU as it happens.

features.title: Inventory across the chain
features.detail: Warehouse to van to shelf. Stock variance stops being a mystery.

features.title: Route planning & agent tracking
features.detail: Who visited which outlet, when, and what was sold or returned.

features.title: Credit & collections control
features.detail: Outstanding balances per outlet, with limits enforced at the point of sale.

items.pricingNote: Licensed per agent and warehouse — request a custom quote.
